---
title: "Projects"
---

# 📊 Selected Projects

## 🌍 Global Data Analysis (2009 Dataset)

- Built SQL database from raw CSV data  
- Conducted EDA using R  
- Found negative relationship between life expectancy and child mortality  
- Visualized with scatter plots & histograms  

---

## 📈 Life Expectancy Prediction Model (2019)

- Built multiple regression models in R  
- Created categorical & interaction variables  
- Collaborated with 4 team members  
- Produced analytical report on predictive factors  

---

## 💉 COVID-19 & Economic Indicators Analysis

- Calculated vaccination rates by country  
- Used Pearson & Spearman correlation  
- Built regression models to test relationships  
- Visualized using Tableau + R  

---

## 🏭 Nutrition Industry Brand Analysis

- Cleaned and processed data in Excel  
- Built Power BI dashboards  
- Analyzed sales trends and product distribution  
- Created charts: pie, line, bar  

---

## 🤖 AI in Education Research

- Collected and cleaned multi-source datasets  
- Built statistical models in R  
- Applied ML (clustering, decision trees)  
- Built dashboards (Power BI / Tableau)  
- Identified at-risk students  
- Delivered data-driven recommendations  

---

# 💼 Professional Experience

## Data Analyst – ZJATI (2025)

- Built dashboards and KPI tracking systems  
- Supported data warehouse optimization  
- Applied ML models for prediction and clustering  
- Worked on AI & smart city projects  

---

## Data Analyst – Tianjin Urban Construction Institute (2023)

- Extracted & cleaned data using Python & SQL  
- Built dashboards (Tableau / Power BI)  
- Evaluated project ROI and environmental metrics  
- Supported strategic decision-making
